description_long: This is a medium-sized bird with a streamlined body and predominantly brownish-gray plumage. The wings and back display subtle barring and mottled patterns, while the underparts are lighter with some white markings. The head is rounded with a short, slightly hooked beak, and the eyes are positioned laterally. The tail is broad and rounded, with faint lighter patches and a slightly notched tip. The legs are mostly hidden but appear to be grayish in color, and the overall feather texture is dense and smooth.
description: A medium-sized, brownish-gray bird with mottled wings, a rounded tail, and a short, hooked beak.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, mottled wing pattern, and subtle white markings on the belly.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the broad, rounded tail with faint lighter patches and the symmetry of the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the smooth contour of the back and the subtle barring on the wings.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded head, short beak, and the bird's chest and facial features.
attribute_plumage_pattern: mottled and barred with subtle gradients and light patches on the underparts and tail
